content.en:
"Tricky Wood Red Dragon, if you can't take away the true picture of the black mother, let's come to understand the body of the black mother, only by practicing the first layer of the body of the black mother, can you pass the test and get the reward!" Ye Tian said.

"Hmm!"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon nodded.

If he has practiced the first layer of the Wumu True Body, he can get a reward, and then he can choose the Wumu True Liquid.

Fortunately, he hadn't yet cultivated other innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, and cultivating the Wumu True Body didn't have any effect.

Suddenly, he looked at Ye Tian and frowned, "Ye Tian, you have cultivated the Jiaye Wisdom Body, if you cultivate the second innate multi-dimensional Dao body, your body will inevitably collapse, and you won't be able to survive at all, and the rejection of the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies is not something you can imagine at all." Besides, if you want to cultivate the second innate multi-dimensional Dao body, it is almost impossible to do it. "

He felt a little pity, it seemed that Ye Tian would not be able to pass this test.

"Tricky Wood Red Dragon, is it really impossible for the Transcendental Realm to cultivate two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies at the same time?" Ye Tian asked.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon shook his head and sighed: "It's not that it can't be cultivated into two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, it's a normal super-dimensional realm that can't be done at all! It is extremely difficult to cultivate one innate multi-dimensional Dao body, not to mention two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, and the rejection between the innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies has to be resolved." The degree of rejection between different innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies is different, even between the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies with a relatively high degree of fit, there is also a lot of rejection, as for how to solve the problem of rejection, I still ~ really don't know. "

At this time, he remembered the Wumu Realm Master: "The Wumu Realm Master has cultivated the three innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, maybe he has a way to solve the problem of rejection, but if you can't pass the assessment, you can't get his method!"

"Got it!"

Ye Tian didn't continue to ask about the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, because the other party didn't know either.

However, he felt that the innate multi-dimensional Dao body of the Wumu Body should be very compatible with his Ka Ye wisdom body, and the rejection between the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies should not be high, and the hope of his cultivation should still be very great, and it should be able to maintain it for a long time.

Besides, even if something really went wrong, he didn't have to worry about it, after all, losing a replica body wouldn't have much impact on him.

"Let's start to comprehend the body of the black mother!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, his soul will probed into the true picture of the black mother, and soon saw the first layer of content of the inheritance of the black mother's body, this layer of content is shown in the situation of the black mother's map, if you can't understand this black mother's map, naturally you can't even spy on the real first layer of content.

Ye Tian was very calm, but the Tricky Wood Red Dragon frowned, because he couldn't understand this black mother's diagram.

If you can't even understand the diagram of Wumu, how can you cultivate?

Ye Tian and Yimu Chilong didn't speak to each other, silently contemplating the diagram of Wumu.

Ye Tian didn't know what the Tricky Wood Red Dragon was thinking, he was already immersed in the comprehension of the Wumu Diagram at the moment.

I have to say that the map of Wumu is indeed very mysterious, even more complex than those extradimensional channels.

But if it's not complicated, wouldn't it be possible for other extradimensional realms to casually obtain the inheritance of the body of the black mother?

Even the inheritance of the first layer is enough to excite many extradimensional realms.

The Wumu Realm Lord is not a benevolent fellow, if you want to obtain his inheritance, you don't have enough comprehension talent qualifications, then you won't get any benefit.

Next.

Ye Tian began to go all out to comprehend, and used the Yutian Lotus Platform to comprehend in the outside world, but the grade of the Yutian Lotus Platform was still a little low.

So, he went to other places and bought a high-level super-dimensional dao soldier with a better grade than Yutian Liantai, and the effect was similar, which could be used for deduction and analysis, but the side effects were also very large, but it had no effect on him.

The high-level super-dimensional Daoist soldier he purchased was named the Thirteen-Fold Scarlet Lotus, and he used the Thirteen-Fold Scarlet Lotus to continuously deduce and analyze, and his analysis of the map of Wumu became more and more thorough and understanding.

After a period of time, Ye Tian has thoroughly understood the map of the black mother, and has truly obtained the first layer of the body of the black mother hidden in the map of the black mother.

At this moment, he already knew how to cultivate the body of the black mother.

Immediately, he glanced at the Tricky Wood Red Dragon next to him, still frowning tightly, and there seemed to be no progress.

"Let's remind the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, after all, he brought me here, although he brought him into the safest extradimensional passage and into the real inheritance land, but if the Tricky Wood Red Dragon can't get any benefits, then I'm not embarrassed!"

So, Ye Tian informed the Tricky Wood Red Dragon of his experience in how to analyze the map of the black mother.

As for whether the Tricky Wood Red Dragon can truly understand and comprehend the diagram of the Black Mother, it depends on the Tricky Wood Red Dragon himself, after all, there are some things that cannot be said with his mouth, or even recorded, and can only be understood by himself.

"Ye Tian, thank you!"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon smiled.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's guidance, he was afraid that it would be difficult for him to see the first layer of the content of the Wumu body, and if he couldn't even see the content, how could he cultivate, let alone pass the assessment.

Immediately, he followed Ye Tian's instructions to comprehend the map of Wumu, and sure enough, he began to gain something.

However, even so, if he wanted to truly obtain the first layer of the body of the black mother, it was not something that could be done in a short period of time.

......

Ye Tian had already obtained the content of the first layer of the black mother's body and was ready to start cultivating.

The content of the first layer of the body of the black mother does not need any auxiliary things, such as the wisdom body of the black mother still needs the wisdom leaf of the black mist, and the multi-dimensional body of the black fog also needs the energy of the black fog, and the first layer of the body of the black mother only needs to cultivate a map of the black mother, and enter the body with the picture of the black mother, promote the transformation of the physical body, and practice the first layer of the body of the black mother.

"Using the diagram of the black mother to comprehend the first layer of the body of the black mother, and then cultivating a diagram of the black mother in turn, it is worthy of being one of the inheritances of the sixth realm!"

Ye Tian began to cultivate the first layer of the black mother's body, but even if it was the first layer, once the cultivation failed, the body would still be severely damaged.

But.

Ye Tian had already thoroughly comprehended the content of the first layer of the Wumu body, and the success rate of his cultivation was still very high.

Immediately, he began to cultivate with all his might.

I saw that a ray of extradimensional rule light gradually appeared around his body, and it seemed that he was condensing the diagram of the black mother according to the cultivation method of the black mother's body, but he was cultivating in the outside world and tried to use the copy body of the outside world.

In this way, even if the cultivation fails, you can re-cultivate, and the Tricky Wood Red Dragon will not be able to find it.
